Bar light units can be customized by color, intensity, length, width and instillation position.
Bar lights can be customized by color, intensity, length, width, LED rows and instillation position.
In bladder instillation, the prescription medication dimethyl sulfoxide, or DMSO, (Rimso-50) is placed into your bladder through a thin, flexible tube (catheter) inserted through the urethra.
